h2: Ready to scale your home service business?

At Agnos, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or engage with our services.
We may collect the following types of information:
Personal Information (e.g., name, email address, phone number) — provided voluntarily through forms, contact requests, or newsletters.
Project Information — details you share with us regarding your brand, business, or project requirements.
Usage Data — such as IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on the site (collected automatically via cookies or analytics tools).
We use the information we collect to:
Respond to your inquiries or project requests
Analyze website performance and user behavior
Ensure legal compliance and prevent misuse
We do not sell or trade your personal data. We may share your information with:
Trusted third-party service providers (e.g., hosting, analytics, CRM tools) who assist in operating our business
Law enforcement or government agencies if required by law
All third-party services comply with applicable data protection laws.
Our website uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance user experience and gather usage statistics. You can manage or disable cookies in your browser settings.
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to safeguard your personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
Access or update your personal information
Request the deletion of your data
Withdraw consent or opt out of communications
Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their content or privacy practices. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before sharing any data.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with the updated date. We recommend checking back periodically to stay informed.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at:Email: eric@scalenational.com or tim@scalenational.com

/projects/harvest-organics.title: Harvest Organics
/projects/harvest-organics.description: Developed a nature-inspired brand system and packaging that strengthens shelf presence, authenticity, and consumer trust.
h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Developed a nature-inspired brand system and packaging that strengthens shelf presence, authenticity, and consumer trust.
Harvest Organics wanted packaging and a brand system that communicated freshness and sustainability, but their visuals felt generic and failed to stand out on shelves or digital channels.

We built a nature-inspired identity using warm tones, organic patterns, and clean typography. Packaging layouts were standardized, and storytelling elements were added to highlight quality and sustainability.
The refreshed brand gained stronger recognition both online and in retail environments, driving higher customer trust and improved sales performance.
Higher sales lift across key items
The new brand tells our story instantly. Customers connect with us more, and the packaging stands out everywhere.

/projects/lumin-interiors.title: Lumin Interiors
/projects/lumin-interiors.description: Crafted an elegant, editorial-inspired identity that enhances project storytelling and elevates the overall brand presence.
h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Crafted an elegant, editorial-inspired identity that enhances project storytelling and elevates the overall brand presence.

Lumin Interiors needed a digital presence that matched their high-end interior work. Their website felt flat, lacked emotional depth, and failed to highlight project quality, leading to low engagement.

We elevated the experience with a warm, editorial-style layout, refined typography, and full-width imagery. Each project was restructured to highlight inspiration, process, and results in a cohesive narrative flow.
The new site captures the personality and elegance of the brand, boosting interaction across portfolios and increasing client inquiries.
Our projects now shine online as beautifully as they do in person. The upgrade has made a dramatic impact on client interest.

/projects/pixelforge-studio.title: PixelForge Studio
/projects/pixelforge-studio.description: Built a motion-first portfolio showcasing animation work with improved performance, clarity, and creative expression.
h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Built a motion-first portfolio showcasing animation work with improved performance, clarity, and creative expression.
PixelForge struggled to present its animation work digitally. Video reels were hard to browse, performance was slow, and the site lacked the playful energy that defines the brand.

We introduced a dynamic, motion-first portfolio with faster media delivery, clearer navigation, and vibrant branding moments. Animations were used purposefully to reflect the studio’s creative personality.
PixelForge now has a lively digital identity that showcases its reels effortlessly, driving stronger client interest and higher viewing completion rates.
The design captures our creative energy perfectly. Reels load faster, look better, and attract more of the right clients.

h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Modernized the platform with streamlined dashboards, stronger trust signals, and simplified financial insight delivery.
Summit Finance needed a platform that felt secure, credible, and easy to understand. Their previous UI relied heavily on text, lacked structure, and overwhelmed users with information.
We modernized the interface with simplified layouts, clearer typography, and stronger trust indicators. Dashboards were redesigned to highlight the most actionable insights and reduce cognitive load.
Users now navigate with confidence, and Summit Finance reports better engagement across tools and dashboards, boosting client trust.

/projects/nova-studio.title: Nova Studio
/projects/nova-studio.description: Unified the brand and service experience to better express value, improve navigation, and strengthen conversions.
h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Unified the brand and service experience to better express value, improve navigation, and strengthen conversions.

Nova Studio struggled with a fragmented brand presence that diluted their message. Their website lacked cohesion, navigation was unclear, and key services were buried under confusing layouts, leading to missed opportunities.
Low conversion due to weak page flow

We unified the studio’s brand system with consistent typography, spacing, and layout patterns. Services were reorganized into clear categories, supported by improved content structure and simplified user flows.
Nova Studio now communicates its value more confidently, driving higher engagement and smoother user journeys across all service pages.
The redesign brought clarity we were missing for years. Clients now understand our value instantly, and engagement has never been better.

/projects/atelier-nine.title: Atelier Nine
/projects/atelier-nine.description: Elevated the portfolio design to showcase craftsmanship with greater clarity, cohesion, and visual impact.
h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Elevated the portfolio design to showcase craftsmanship with greater clarity, cohesion, and visual impact.

As Atelier Nine scaled its digital presence, users struggled to navigate a scattered and outdated portfolio. Project pages lacked structure, visuals felt inconsistent, and the browsing experience failed to reflect the studio’s premium craftsmanship.

We reworked the portfolio architecture with a clean, gallery-first approach and introduced consistent layout rules for all project pages. Visual hierarchy was refined, imagery was optimized, and a modular system was built to support ongoing project updates.
Atelier Nine now delivers a polished, immersive portfolio experience. Users spend more time exploring work, bounce rates dropped, and project inquiries increased significantly.
Everything finally feels aligned with our vision. The new portfolio elevated our brand and made showcasing our work effortless.

/projects/orion-fitness.title: Orion Fitness
/projects/orion-fitness.description: Designed a motivating mobile experience with clearer progress tracking, smoother usability, and stronger daily engagement.
h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Designed a motivating mobile experience with clearer progress tracking, smoother usability, and stronger daily engagement.

Orion Fitness aimed to create a motivating wellness experience, but users struggled with unclear data visuals, inconsistent screens, and limited mobile usability. Engagement dropped as goals became harder to track.

We rebuilt the interface around clarity and momentum, using simplified data visuals, upgraded layouts, and micro-interactions that reinforce user progress. A modular design system was introduced to support new features.
Engagement increased across key metrics as users found it easier to track habits and stay consistent. The refreshed mobile experience drove stronger retention and daily activity.
The new interface motivates users daily. Tracking progress is clearer, faster, and far more engaging than before.

/projects/haven-living.title: Haven Living
/projects/haven-living.description: Created a warm, lifestyle-driven digital presence that highlights interior quality, storytelling, and modern aesthetics.
h2: Ready to scale your home service business?
h3: Ready to scale your home service business?
p: Created a warm, lifestyle-driven digital presence that highlights interior quality, storytelling, and modern aesthetics.

Haven Living wanted to showcase modern interior solutions, but their platform felt outdated and lacked warmth. Users had difficulty viewing collections, and the design didn’t reflect the sophistication of their physical spaces.

We shifted the experience to a lifestyle-driven layout, emphasizing large visuals, clean modular grids, and emotional storytelling. Product collections were reorganized for easier browsing and better engagement.
Haven Living now delivers an inviting, premium browsing experience that mirrors the quality of its interiors, resulting in higher exploration and improved conversion paths.
The experience feels warm, modern, and true to our identity. It completely transformed how clients explore our interiors.
